mapper.select:
SELECT id, reagent_name, cas_number, content, create_time FROM web_search_result
AND reagent_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{reagentName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, reagent_name, cas_number, content, create_time FROM web_search_result WHERE reagent_name = #{reagentName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO web_search_result (reagent_name, cas_number, content, create_time) VALUES (#{reagentName}, #{casNumber}, #{content}, NOW())
